headline: Can Cigna's Expansion Beyond Health Insurance Fuel Long-Term Growth?
summary: CI is evolving beyond traditional insurance, using AI, specialty pharmacy and healthcare services to drive growth and sharpen its business focus.

raw.headline: Can Cigna's Expansion Beyond Health Insurance Fuel Long-Term Growth?
raw.summary: CI is evolving beyond traditional insurance, using AI, specialty pharmacy and healthcare services to drive growth and sharpen its business focus.

headline: The Cigna Group Foundation Honors David M. Cordani's Leadership with New Grant to Strengthen Military Communities
summary: The Cigna Group Foundation, the philanthropic arm of The Cigna Group (NYSE: CI), today announced the launch of the David M. Cordani Courage in Service Grant, a new $1.5 million, 10-year commitment to support the health and well-being of military and veteran communities by prioritizing social connection.
